title: Taxonomy Architecture Analyzer
description: Taxonomy Architecture Analyzer is an open-source, AI-assisted enterprise architecture and knowledge graph platform for deriving, analysing and versioning architecture models from requirements, regulations, documents and architecture taxonomies. It combines hierarchical LLM-assisted scoring, explainable architecture mapping, relation discovery, source provenance, a Git-backed architecture DSL, and export formats such as ArchiMate, Visio, Mermaid, JSON, Markdown, HTML and DOCX. The project is intended for research and experimentation in enterprise architecture management, requirements engineering, regulatory architecture mapping, architecture decision support, and reproducible AI-assisted software engineering workflows.
notes: The Zenodo archive captures a release of the source code, metadata, citation instructions, and research documentation. Reproducibility instructions are provided in docs/research/reproducibility.md.
